TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Masuhuaz, title = Masuhuaz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Masuhuaz} }

S.FORM: alang Masuhuaz ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 306 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 291 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 93%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Masuhuaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Masuhuaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masuhuaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Masuhuaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masuhuaz hya' ga Dakus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Masuhuaz ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 101 buwan, 306 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 291 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 93%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Masuhuaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Masuhuaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masuhuaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Masuhuaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masuhuaz hya' ga Dakus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mas~ɕuħuaz ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mas~ɕuħuaz ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mas~ɕuħuaz ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕuħuaz ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mas~ɕuħuaz ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕuħuaz ħjaʔ ɣa *akus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
